empirical.interpretation: The foundation is in place and the technical gate is green (ruff + mypy clean, 44 tests, 97% coverage). The executable closure contract, layered memory, plugins, and full governance doc set are committed and pushed. Phase 0 has no empirical hypothesis; its go/no-go is the technical gate, which is met.

integrity.tarka_memo: Strongest objection: a foundation can look complete while hiding gaps that surface only under real experimental load (e.g. the GB10/Blackwell ML stack, the Saṃsādhanī generator's diversity ceiling, or Z3 vyāpti coverage). Response: these are explicitly tracked as Phase 0/1 de-risking items in ADR 0007 and the phase-1 contract, and the closure contract itself is unit-tested (39 contract/analysis tests) so the governance machinery is verified rather than assumed. No fatal confound for Phase 0's own (technical) go/no-go.

signoff.note: Foundation approved. Phase 1 cleared to run to its own closure gate without intermediate pause. triz-engine (ADR-0009) and attractor-flow (CONVERGING) used in closure.
